title: sprint-4-research-non-backtestable-priors: Compile literature evidence for WSA-Enlil sigma, doubt-price floors, Wheatland prior, Bz volatility threshold, source-reliability scores, uncertainty pricing constants
close_reason: Literature evidence compiled in §3-§8 of grimoires/loa/calibration/corona/empirical-evidence.md. 14 primary-literature citations across the 6 PRD §5.5 coverage targets: WSA-Enlil sigma (Mays 2015, Riley 2018, Wold 2018), doubt-price floors (Aschwanden 2012, Veronig 2002, Matzka 2021), Wheatland prior (Wheatland 2001/2010, Bain 2016, Cliver 2020), Bz volatility (Tsurutani 1988, Burlaga 1981), source-reliability (Singer 2001, Pulkkinen 2013), uncertainty pricing (textbook + NOAA operational). Confidence ratings (high/medium/low) attached per parameter.

comments.author: 0xElCapitan
comments.text: Sprint 4 audit CHANGES_REQUIRED — 2 HIGH-severity findings. CR-1: corona-evidence-006 (Kp σ definitive=0.33, T2 settlement-critical) YAML has confidence:high + provisional:false + 'Direct citation; high confidence' notes — contradicts §4.2 inline tag (ENGINEER_CURATED_REQUIRES_VERIFICATION) and §4.5 section-level disclaimer. CR-2: corona-evidence-020 (log_flux linearization, T1 settlement-critical) YAML has confidence:high — contradicts §8.3 Round 2 demotion to MEDIUM/OPERATIONAL_DOC_ONLY. Round 2 review missed §4 + §8 manifest entries (Round 1 CI-2 scope was §7 only). Round 3 fix: YAML-only, ~10 min, demote both entries' confidence to medium + add verification_status field + flip provisional to true + add promotion_path. Other 7 focus areas clean. Operator focus #7 violation.
